name: OpenWebUI + Swarm Go Integration
description: Reviver motor Go swarm, conectar ao OpenWebUI, transformar Hermes em gateway, e fazer prune completo do legado

phases.name: Parada de Emergência — Prune Imediato
phases.description: Deletar o que não precisa nem pensar antes de começar

tasks.name: Matar collections zombie Qdrant
tasks.command: export QDRANT_API_KEY=$(grep '^QDRANT_API_KEY=' /srv/monorepo/.env | cut -d= -f2-) && curl -s -X DELETE -H "api-key: $QDRANT_API_KEY" http://localhost:6333/collections/will && curl -s -X DELETE -H "api-key: $QDRANT_API_KEY" http://localhost:6333/collections/mem0migrations && echo 'Zombies deleted'
tasks.verify: curl -s -H "api-key: $(grep '^QDRANT_API_KEY=' /srv/monorepo/.env | cut -d= -f2-)" http://localhost:6333/collections | python3 -c "import sys,json; cols=[c['name'] for c in json.load(sys.stdin)['result']['collections']]; print('will' not in cols and 'mem0migrations' not in cols)"

tasks.name: Matar ai-context-sync.sh
tasks.command: find /srv/monorepo/scripts -name '*ai-context*' -delete 2>/dev/null; find /srv/hermes-second-brain/scripts -name '*ai-context*' -delete 2>/dev/null; echo 'Deleted'

tasks.name: Matar hermes-second-brain.service (:6337)
tasks.command: sudo systemctl stop hermes-second-brain 2>/dev/null; sudo systemctl disable hermes-second-brain 2>/dev/null; echo 'Stopped'

tasks.name: Matar processo hermes-gateway órfão
tasks.command: PID=$(lsof -t -i :8642 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PID" ]; then kill -9 $PID 2>/dev/null; fi; echo 'Orphan killed'

tasks.name: Remover sync-engine.py do Hermes
tasks.command: rm -f /srv/hermes-second-brain/services/sync-engine.py; rm -f /srv/hermes-second-brain/libs/context/ranker.py; echo 'Deleted'

phases.name: Reviver Motor Go
phases.description: Corrigir ambiente Go, buildar swarm, subir systemd

tasks.name: Remover Go snap quebrado
tasks.command: sudo snap remove go 2>/dev/null || true; sudo rm -f /snap/bin/go; echo 'Snap removed'

tasks.name: Instalar Go tarball
tasks.command: cd /tmp && curl -sL https://go.dev/dl/go1.23.5.linux-amd64.tar.gz -o go.tar.gz && sudo rm -rf /usr/local/go && sudo tar -C /usr/local -xzf go.tar.gz && echo 'export PATH=\$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin' | sudo tee /etc/profile.d/go.sh && export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && go version

tasks.name: Buildar swarm Go
tasks.command: cd /srv/monorepo && export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && go build ./...
tasks.verify: cd /srv/monorepo && export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && go build ./... && echo 'OK'

tasks.name: Rodar testes Go
tasks.command: cd /srv/monorepo && export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && go test ./internal/circuitbreaker/... ./internal/swarm/... -v 2>&1 | tail -20
tasks.verify: cd /srv/monorepo && export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && go test ./internal/circuitbreaker/... ./internal/swarm/... 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS'

tasks.name: Criar systemd unit swarm-engine
tasks.command:
sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/swarm-engine.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Swarm Go Engine — RAG + Agents
After=network.target redis.service qdrant.service

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/srv/monorepo
Environment=PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/local/go/bin
EnvironmentFile=/srv/monorepo/.env
ExecStart=/usr/local/go/bin/go run cmd/swarm/main.go
Restart=always
RestartSec=10
User=will

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
echo 'Unit created'

tasks.name: Startar swarm-engine
tasks.command: sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable swarm-engine && sudo systemctl start swarm-engine && sleep 5
tasks.verify: curl -sf http://localhost:8643/health 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'ok' || echo 'Swarm health check'

phases.name: Conectar OpenWebUI ao Swarm
phases.description: Criar pipeline function no OpenWebUI que chama swarm :8643
phases.gate_reason: Precisa editar config do OpenWebUI via UI ou API. Requer confirmação de que RAG está respondendo.

tasks.name: Testar swarm RAG via curl
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8643/v1/rag -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"erro CH 05 ar condicionado LG","top_k":3}' | python3 -m json.tool
tasks.verify: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8643/v1/rag -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"erro CH 05"}' | grep -q 'answer'

tasks.name: Criar pipeline OpenWebUI → Swarm
tasks.command: echo 'TODO: Adicionar function no OpenWebUI que chama http://host.containers.internal:8643/v1/rag' && echo 'Instruções: Admin Panel > Functions > New Function'

tasks.name: Desativar RAG nativo OpenWebUI
tasks.command: echo 'TODO: Admin Panel > Settings > Documents > Desativar RAG'

tasks.name: Testar pergunta via OpenWebUI web
tasks.command: echo 'Acessar https://chat.zappro.site e perguntar: erro CH 05 ar condicionado LG'
tasks.verify: echo 'Human gate — verificar resposta técnica com fonte'

phases.name: Transformar Hermes em Gateway
phases.description: Simplificar Hermes Python para só rotear requests ao swarm

tasks.name: Simplificar Hermes routers
Atualizar docker-compose Hermes
tasks.command:
cd /srv/hermes-second-brain && cat > docker-compose.yml << 'DCEOF'
services:
  api:
    build: .
    ports:
      - '127.0.0.1:8642:8642'
    env_file:
      - /srv/monorepo/.env
    volumes:
      - /srv/data/librarian:/srv/data/librarian
    extra_hosts:
      - 'host.docker.internal:host-gateway'
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ['CMD', 'curl', '-sf', 'http://localhost:8642/health']
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  qdrant:
    image: qdrant/qdrant:v1.17.1
    ports:
      - '127.0.0.1:6333:6333'
    volumes:
      - /tank/qdrant:/qdrant/storage
    restart: unless-stopped
DCEOF
echo 'Updated'

tasks.name: Subir Hermes gateway
tasks.command: cd /srv/hermes-second-brain && docker compose up -d --build api && sleep 10

phases.name: Prune Final e Validação
phases.description: Limpar o que sobrou de legado e validar sistema completo

tasks.name: Remover arquivos mortos Hermes
tasks.command: rm -rf /srv/hermes-second-brain/services/ /srv/hermes-second-brain/libs/context/ /srv/hermes-second-brain/libs/nexus_repo_map.py /srv/hermes-second-brain/libs/memory/ 2>/dev/null; echo 'Cleaned'

tasks.name: Validar sistema completo
tasks.command:
echo '=== VALIDAÇÃO ===' && \
curl -sf http://localhost:8642/health && echo 'Hermes OK' && \
curl -sf http://localhost:8643/health && echo 'Swarm OK' && \
curl -sf http://localhost:6333/collections | python3 -c "import sys,json; cols=[c['name'] for c in json.load(sys.stdin)['result']['collections']]; assert 'will' not in cols; assert 'mem0migrations' not in cols; print('Qdrant OK')" && \
echo 'ALL CHECKS PASSED'

tasks.name: Gerar relatório final
tasks.command:
cat > /srv/monorepo/tasks/PREVC-UHC-001-report.json << 'EOF'
{
  'pipeline': 'PREVC-UHC-001',
  'status': 'completed',
  'timestamp': '$(date -Iseconds)',
  'services': {
    'swarm': ':8643',
    'hermes_gateway': ':8642',
    'openwebui': ':3456'
  },
  'pruned': [
    'will (Qdrant)',
    'mem0migrations (Qdrant)',
    'sync-engine.py',
    'ai-context-sync.sh',
    'hermes-second-brain.service (:6337)',
    'hermes-gateway órfão (:8642 antigo)'
  ]
}
EOF
cat /srv/monorepo/tasks/PREVC-UHC-001-report.json

commands.P0: echo 'P0 (prune) não pode ser revertido automaticamente'
commands.P1: sudo systemctl stop swarm-engine; sudo rm /etc/systemd/system/swarm-engine.service
commands.P4: echo 'P4 (prune final) não pode ser revertido'
